name: toughtongue-skills
description: Skills and MCP server for ToughTongue AI — the voice-agent platform for interviews, sales, coaching, and negotiations. Create scenarios, refine them from real transcripts, and analyze session performance from your coding agent.

plugins.name: toughtongue
plugins.description: Create, refine, and analyze ToughTongue AI voice-agent scenarios through the ToughTongue MCP server. Includes scenario-creator, scenario-refiner, and session-analyst skills.
